views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Collection overview showing total recipe count, favorites carousel, recently added recipes, cuisine distribution donut, and a quick-add FAB. Top stat cards show total recipes, times cooked this month, current cooking streak, and average rating.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Multi-section recipe entry form: name and photo at top, meal category and cuisine pickers, servings/prep/cook time steppers in a row, difficulty picker, multi-line ingredients field (one per line), multi-line instructions field, rating slider, favorite toggle, and notes.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Searchable, filterable recipe collection. Cards show recipe name, cuisine badge, prep+cook total time, rating stars, and times cooked count. Filter by category, cuisine, difficulty, or favorites. Sort by date added, rating, times cooked, or total time.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Cuisine distribution pie chart, category breakdown bar chart, cooking frequency over time line chart, average rating trend, top 5 most cooked recipes leaderboard, difficulty distribution, and AI-generated insights about cooking habits.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of saved recipes in the collection

viewModelComputedProperties.name: favoriteRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries where isFavorite is true, sorted by rating descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recipesAddedThisWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of recipes added in the current calendar week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recipesAddedThisMonth
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of recipes added in the current calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalTimesCooked
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of timesCooked across all recipes

viewModelComputedProperties.name: timesCookedThisMonth
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Estimated cooking sessions this month based on entries with timesCooked incremented recently

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageRating
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean rating across all recipes that have been rated (rating > 0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageTotalTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean of (prepTimeMinutes + cookTimeMinutes) across all recipes

viewModelComputedProperties.name: cookingStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive weeks where at least one recipe was added or cooked, counting back from current week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: cuisineDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of recipes per CuisineType for pie chart, sorted by count descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of recipes per MealCategory for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostCookedRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 5 recipes by timesCooked, returning name and count

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAdditionTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Recipes added per week for the last 8 weeks, for sparkline chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of weekly new recipe goal achieved (recipesAddedThisWeek / weeklyGoal)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: quickRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Recipes where prepTimeMinutes + cookTimeMinutes <= 30, sorted by total time ascending

dailyGoal.description: Weekly new recipe goal — number of new recipes to add per week to grow your collection steadily

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A week counts as active if at least one recipe was added OR an existing recipe had its timesCooked incremented. Streak counts consecutive active weeks back from the current week.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track recipes added per week (8-week rolling window) vs previous 8-week period to show collection growth rate. Track average rating trend monthly to see if recipe quality/selection is improving. Monitor cuisine diversity index (unique cuisines used / total cuisines available) over time.
insights: Cuisine diversity score: percentage of available cuisine types represented in collection, with encouragement to try underrepresented ones
Most cooked recipe highlight: surface the user's go-to recipe with total cook count
Time efficiency insight: compare average total time this month vs last month, flag if trending longer or shorter
Difficulty progression: track ratio of easy/medium/hard over time, note if user is leveling up
Neglected favorites: recipes marked favorite but timesCooked is 0 — nudge to actually cook them
Collection growth rate: recipes per week trend with motivational framing
Quick meal ratio: percentage of recipes under 30 minutes, helpful for busy week planning
Cooking consistency: weeks with at least one cook session, displayed as a percentage over last 3 months
